headline: Volkswagen Chief Says Company 'Not Afraid' Of Apple Electric Car
summary: Volkswagen (OTC: VLKAF) CEO says the company is not worried about the prospect of an electric car from Apple Inc (NASDAQ: AAPL).

headline: Green With Envy For Nvidia Stock: How Much $1,000 Invested 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
summary: Investors who have owned stocks since 2016 generally have experienced some big gains. In fact, the SPDR S&P 500 (NYSE: SPY) total return in the past five years is 131.9%. But there is no question some big-name stocks performed better than others along the way.

headline: Is BlackBerry Back? With New Partnerships, The Company Is Ready For A Closer Look
summary: BlackBerry Ltd (NYSE: BB) has been hot lately, and not only for its WallStreetBets fame. BlackBerry released some big news, including information about its QNX and IVY systems partnerships.

headline: Why 4 Analysts Think Disney Can Thrive Now And After The Pandemic
summary: The Walt Disney Company (NYSE: DIS) has smashed second-quarter expectations on Thursday due to strong growth in its streaming service Disney+.

headline: Tony Zhang's Options Strategy For NVIDIA
summary: On CNBC's "Options Action," Tony Zhang suggested that investors should consider a bullish options strategy in NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ: NVDA) ahead of earnings, scheduled for February 24.

headline: Mark Zuckerberg Told Facebook Staff In 2018 To 'Inflict Pain' On Apple: Report

headline: Bitcoin Price Nears $50,000 Following A Week Of Good News
summary:
The price of the leading cryptocurrency has broken another record — surpassing the $49,000 level.

What Happened: Bitcoin (BTC) has gained 5.69% over the last 20 hours, reaching a record $49,527 at the time of writing.

headline: The Week Ahead In Biotech: FDA Decision On G1 Therapeutics, Earnings In The Mix For Light Calendar Week
summary: Biotech stocks advanced in the week ended Feb. 12, thanks to broader market strength and company-specific catalysts. Small and mid-cap earnings, multiple conference presentations, data readouts and a slew of IPOs were all part of the week's news flow.

headline: Barron's Latest Picks And Pans: COVID Booster Shot Plays, Defense M&As, Coty, Hologic, And More
summary:
This weekend's Barron's cover story offers a look at the 100 must sustainable companies.
	Other featured articles discuss the changing vaccine industry, the history of electric vehicles and consolidation in the defense sector.
